channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [POPULARES] Popular Estate: Unmodified Audit Opinion for FY26
item.description:
Popular Estate Management Ltd. has declared that their statutory auditor, H. S. Jani & Associates, issued an audit report with an unmodified opinion on the standalone financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The results were approved at a board meeting held on May 9, 2026, as per Regulation 33(3)(d) of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

  • Auditor H. S. Jani & Associates issued an unmodified opinion.
  • Audit pertains to standalone financial results for FY26.
  • Results approved in board meeting held on May 9, 2026.
  • Filing is pursuant to SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POPULAR ESTATE MANAGEMENT LTD. | Category: Auditor

item.title: [PRSNTIN] Prashant India Ltd: CFO Vinod Jadhav Resigns
item.description:
Mr. Vinod Pandurang Jadhav, the Chief Financial Officer of Prashant India Ltd, has resigned from his position, effective May 18, 2026. The company has informed the BSE Limited about this change, as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Mr. Jadhav's resignation letter, dated May 16, 2026, has been submitted to the company, and he will be relieved of his duties accordingly.

  • Vinod Pandurang Jadhav resigned as CFO of Prashant India Ltd.
  • Resignation is effective from May 18, 2026.
  • Company informed BSE as per SEBI regulations.
  • Resignation letter submitted on May 16, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PRASHANT INDIA LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [PRSNTIN] Prashant India Ltd: KMP List Update After CFO Resignation
item.description:
Prashant India Ltd. has announced changes to its Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) following the resignation of Mr. Vinod Pandurang Jadhav, the Chief Financial Officer (CFO). The company has updated the list of authorized KMPs for determining the materiality of events and making disclosures to the stock exchange, as per Regulation 30(5) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The updated KMPs are Prabhudas Mohanbhai (Managing Director) and Swati Joshi (Company Secretary).

  • Vinod Pandurang Jadhav resigned as CFO of Prashant India Ltd.
  • Prabhudas Mohanbhai is the Managing Director and a key contact.
  • Swati Joshi is the Company Secretary and a key contact.
  • KMP list updated per SEBI regulations after CFO resignation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PRASHANT INDIA LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [VIVIMEDLAB] Vivimed Labs Board Meeting on May 28, 2026 to Approve FY26 Results
item.description:
Vivimed Labs Ltd has scheduled a meeting of its Board of Directors on May 28, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results (standalone & consolidated) for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 28, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited financial results for FY 2025-2026.
  • Both standalone and consolidated results will be considered.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VIVIMED LABS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RCCEMEN] RCC Cements Board Meeting on May 27, 2026
item.description:
RCC Cements Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 27, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the appointment of M/s Sanghi & Co. as the Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27. The trading window for dealing in the company's shares is closed and will remain closed until May 29, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 27, 2026 to approve audited financial results.
  • Appointment of M/s Sanghi & Co. as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27 to be considered.
  • Trading window closed until May 29, 2026, due to declaration of financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RCC CEMENTS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VALINDIA] Valencia India Ltd Board Meeting on 28 May 2026
item.description:
Valencia India Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 28, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the six months and financial year ended March 31, 2026, along with the Independent Audit Report. The board will also consider the appointment of Mr. Prashant H. Patel as the Internal Auditor for the financial year 2026-2027. Other business matters may be discussed with the chair's permission.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 28, 2026.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 to be considered.
  • Appointment of Internal Auditor for 2026-2027 on the agenda.
  • Meeting is pursuant to Regulation 29 of SEBI Listing Obligations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Valencia India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BPCAP] B. P. Capital Board Meeting Scheduled for May 27, 2026
item.description:
B. P. Capital Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for May 27, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the appointment of M/s Sanghi & Co. as the Internal Auditor for the F.Y. 2026-27. The trading window for dealing in the company's shares is closed and will remain closed until May 29, 2026.

  • Board meeting on May 27, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Appointment of M/s Sanghi & Co. as Internal Auditor to be considered.
  • Trading window closed until May 29, 2026, for insider trading regulations.
  • Meeting to be held at the company's registered office in Haryana.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: B. P. Capital Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RPTECH] Rashi Peripherals Corrects Typo in Unmodified Opinion Declaration
item.description:
Rashi Peripherals Ltd. has rectified a typographical error in its declaration of unmodified opinion, initially dated March 31, 2025, which was incorrectly stated in a previous disclosure regarding the outcome of the board meeting held on May 14, 2026. The correct date is March 31, 2026. The company has submitted a revised declaration under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, confirming the unmodified opinion issued by its joint statutory auditors, M/s. Pipara & Co. LLP and M/s. Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP, on the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Rashi Peripherals corrects typo in unmodified opinion declaration.
  • Revised declaration confirms unmodified audit opinion for FY26.
  • Auditors Pipara & Co. LLP and Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP issued the opinion.
  • Correction submitted under SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015.
  • Financial results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rashi Peripherals Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [RADHIKAJWE] Radhika Jeweltech Board Meeting on May 20, 2026
item.description:
Radhika Jeweltech Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 20, 2026, to consider and approve the standalone audited financial results for the quarter/year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's equity shares is currently closed and will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 20, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Consideration of standalone audited financial results for the quarter/year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed; to reopen 48 hours post-results declaration.
  • Meeting to be held at the company's registered office.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Radhika Jeweltech Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VPL] Vrundavan Plantation Board Meeting on May 28, 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Vrundavan Plantation Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 28, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the six months and financial year ended March 31, 2026, along with the Independent Audit Report. The board will also consider and approve the appointment of Mr. Prashant H. Patel as the Internal Auditor for the financial year 2026-2027.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 28, 2026.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 to be considered.
  • Appointment of Internal Auditor for FY27 on the agenda.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vrundavan Plantation Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
